case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. YULIN TSAI et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-15-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TSAI, YULIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-15-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
